# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to NeqSim Community Agents! Please complete the following checklist before requesting review:

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] New or changed agents include all required files and a validation test
- [ ] Updated `community-agents.yaml` and the README catalog if needed
- [ ] Linked to an associated issue or discussion

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full contribution process.
